allow: Bash(cd /c/Apps/Shift-Control && npm install 2>&1 | tail -5)
Bash(cd /c/Apps/Shift-Control && npm run lint 2>&1)
Bash(cd /c/Apps/Shift-Control && npm install react-markdown remark-gfm 2>&1 | tail -5)

Bash(cd /c/Apps/Shift-Control && git add src/App.tsx src/components/ChatArea.tsx && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
feat: wire header connection badge to real n8n status

Badge and label now reflect connectionStatus from App state
\(checking=amber pulse, online=emerald, offline=red\) instead
of the hardcoded WS_CONNECTED green dot.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(cd /c/Apps/Shift-Control && git add src/components/ChatArea.tsx && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
feat: auto-resize textarea as user types

Textarea now grows up to max-h-48 \(192px\) as content is added
and shrinks back after send, via scrollHeight assignment on
each input change.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(cd /c/Apps/Shift-Control && git add src/App.tsx && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
feat: probe n8n webhook on mount and every 30s

App fires a HEAD request to resolve connectionStatus from
'checking' immediately at startup rather than waiting for the
first user message. Retries on a 30s interval. Timeout is 5s.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(cd /c/Apps/Shift-Control && git add src/components/ChatArea.tsx && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
feat: add copy button to assistant messages

Copy icon appears on hover next to the timestamp; clicking
writes the raw markdown content to the clipboard and flashes
a green checkmark for 2s.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(cd /c/Apps/Shift-Control && git add src/components/ChatArea.tsx && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
feat: show attachment preview in user message bubbles

Images render as a thumbnail above the text bubble; other file
types \(PDF, video\) show a named chip with a paperclip icon.
Text bubble is hidden when there is no accompanying text.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(cd /c/Apps/Shift-Control && git add n8n-workflows/ && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
feat: add Media Ingest agent workflow and wire orchestrator

- 4-media-ingest-agent.json: uploads images to Cloudinary,
  generates tags/alt text via LLM, prompts for file if none
  attached
- 1-orchestrator-agent.json: adds 'media' as 4th intent
  \(switch output 2\), Format Media Response node, and updates
  LLM system prompt to recognise the new category

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(cd /c/Apps/Shift-Control && node -e "const d=require\('./node_modules/date-fns/package.json'\); console.log\(d.version\)")

Bash(cd /c/Apps/Shift-Control && git add src/components/ChatArea.tsx && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
feat: relative timestamps on messages

Messages under 60s show 'just now', under 1h show '5 min ago'
etc via date-fns formatDistanceToNowStrict, older messages show
HH:mm. A 30s interval ticker keeps them current. Hovering shows
the full absolute timestamp as a tooltip.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(cd /c/Apps/Shift-Control && git add src/ && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
feat: multi-session conversation management

- src/lib/sessions.ts: Session CRUD helpers, per-session
  localStorage keys \(shift_control_msgs_<id>\), legacy key
  migration on first load
- App.tsx: owns sessions[] + activeSessionId state; passes
  key={activeSessionId} to ChatArea for clean remount on switch
- Sidebar.tsx: Sessions panel with create \(+\), switch, inline
  rename \(pencil icon\), and delete \(trash\) per session
- ChatArea.tsx: accepts storageKey prop; loads/saves messages
  to the per-session key

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(cd /c/Apps/Shift-Control && git add src/components/ChatArea.tsx && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
feat: keyboard shortcut hints and Ctrl+K to clear

Footer now shows Enter/Shift+Enter/Ctrl+K hints with styled
<kbd> chips. Ctrl+K \(or Cmd+K\) is wired to handleClearHistory
via a global keydown listener.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(cd /c/Apps/Shift-Control && git add src/components/ChatArea.tsx && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
feat: message search \(Ctrl+F\)

Search bar opens below header via Ctrl+F or the magnifier
button; Escape closes it. Non-matching messages dim to
opacity-20; matching ones highlight the term. Match count
shown inline. Ctrl+F hint added to footer shortcuts bar.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(cd /c/Apps/Shift-Control && git add src/components/ChatArea.tsx && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
feat: show active agent name in header while processing

Header displays '<Agent> thinking...' with spinner when isTyping.
Agent is guessed from the input prefix \(Shopify:/Social:/Media:\)
before the response arrives, then confirmed from the actual
response data.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(cd /c/Apps/Shift-Control && git add src/components/ChatArea.tsx && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
feat: 10 MB attachment size guard

Files exceeding 10 MB are rejected before reading; shows the
existing error toast with the actual file size. File input is
cleared so the same file can be re-attempted after trimming.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(cd /c/Apps/Shift-Control && git add src/App.tsx && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
fix: re-probe webhook immediately after settings modal closes

Extracted probe into a stable useCallback \(probeConnection\) so
it can be called imperatively. SettingsModal onClose now calls
probeConnection\(\) after closing, so the header/sidebar status
badge updates instantly instead of waiting up to 30 s.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(cd /c/Apps/Shift-Control && git add src/components/ChatArea.tsx && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
feat: per-code-block copy button

Fenced code blocks now render inside a relative-positioned
wrapper with a Copy/Check button in the top-right corner.
Uses inline useState to track copied state per block
independently.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(cd /c/Apps/Shift-Control && git add src/components/Sidebar.tsx && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
feat: skeleton shimmer in sidebar while connection is checking

System Status panel shows three animated shimmer rows while
connectionStatus === 'checking', then fades in live values.
Removes redundant 'Checking...' text state from LLM Router row.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(cd /c/Apps/Shift-Control && git add src/App.tsx && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
feat: swipe-right to open sidebar on mobile

Touches starting within 30px of the left edge that travel
>60px rightward trigger setIsSidebarOpen\(true\). Uses
onTouchStart/onTouchEnd on the root div — no new packages.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
